description: ESP32 IoT Honeypot — full attack analytics with 47-pattern taxonomy

targets.query:
from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "src_ip")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0.0.0.0")
  |> unique(column: "_value")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "auth_success" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "exploit" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "command" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["proto"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value","proto"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["evt"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value","evt"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "src_ip")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0.0.0.0")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with ip: r._value}))
  |> group(columns: ["ip"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 25)
  |> keep(columns: ["ip","_value"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.evt == "auth_attempt" or r.evt == "auth_success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "user" or r._field == "pass")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time","proto","node","evt"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.user and r.user != "")
  |> group(columns: ["user","pass"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 25)
  |> keep(columns: ["user","pass","count"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group(columns: ["proto"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.proto}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "attempt_num")
  |> group(columns: ["evt"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.evt}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "botnet_family")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r._value, _value: 1}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "mitre_technique")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r._value, _value: 1}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "pattern_name")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "UNKNOWN" and r._value != "0")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with pattern: r._value}))
  |> group(columns: ["pattern"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 15)
  |> keep(columns: ["pattern","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count", pattern: "Pattern"})

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "pattern_name")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "UNKNOWN" and r._value != "0")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with pattern: r._value}))
  |> group(columns: ["proto","pattern"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["proto","pattern","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count", pattern: "pattern", proto: "proto"})

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "src_ip" or r._field == "user" or r._field == "pass" or r._field == "cmd" or r._field == "pattern_name")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time","proto","evt","node"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 150)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","proto","evt","node","src_ip","user","pass","cmd","pattern_name"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "command" and r._field == "cmd")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 75)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","proto","node","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "command"})

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "heartbeat" and r._field == "free_heap")
  |> group(columns: ["node"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["node","_value"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r.evt == "heartbeat" and r._field == "free_heap")
  |> group(columns: ["node"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value","node"])

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classified_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lat" or r._field == "lon" or r._field == "country")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.lat != 0.0 or r.lon != 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip", "lat", "lon", "country"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classified_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "country")
  |> group(columns: ["country_code"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 15)

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "user" or r._field == "pass")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.user and r.user != "")
  |> group(columns: ["user", "pass"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 30)

from(bucket: "attacks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classified_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.group != "?" and r.group != "")
  |> group(columns: ["group"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "events"})

panels.title: Attack Campaign Timeline by Phase (5-min windows)

list.definition: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> keep(columns: ["node"]) |> distinct(column: "node")
list.name: node
list.label: Node
list.query: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> keep(columns: ["node"]) |> distinct(column: "node")

list.definition: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> keep(columns: ["proto"]) |> distinct(column: "proto")
list.name: proto
list.label: Protocol
list.query: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> keep(columns: ["proto"]) |> distinct(column: "proto")

list.definition: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "pattern_name") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0") |> distinct(column: "_value")
list.name: pattern
list.label: Pattern
list.query: from(bucket: "attacks") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "pattern_name") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "" and r._value != "0") |> distinct(column: "_value")

title: Honeypot Overview
